response.overview: A seed falls from the pod before its time and finds itself alone in a whole new world yet to be discovered. Amazed by the gigantic blades of grass and the colors, he begins to jump around like a cheerful and carefree child. But soon a force greater than him shows him the harsh law of nature: a gust of wind drags him away between pirouettes and turns, until he finds himself faced with a much more chaotic and fearful jungle than the city.
response.title: Nel silenzio, si sceglie
